chapter_title: Issuance of Licenses, Expiration, and Renewal
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, no violation point shall be given for a conviction of a violation of Section 22526.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 6. DRIVERS' LICENSES [12500 - 15326]
### Chapter 1. Issuance of Licenses, Expiration, and Renewal [12500 - 13020]
#### Article 3. Issuance and Renewal of Licenses [12800 - 12819]
##### § 12810.4

Notwithstanding any other provision of law, no violation point shall be given for a conviction of a violation of Section 22526.

*(Added by Stats. 1993, Ch. 647, Sec. 1. Effective January 1, 1994.)*
